issues.message: The estimated time of 60 minutes is highly unrealistic for a learner to grasp and practice all the introduced concepts (algorithmic thinking, conditionals, two types of loops, functions, and file I/O). Each of these topics typically requires more dedicated time for explanation, understanding, and hands-on practice to achieve mastery, especially for a 'part-2' beginner.
issues.suggested_fix: Increase the `estimated_time_minutes` significantly (e.g., to 120-180 minutes) or consider splitting this module into two or more parts to allow for adequate learning and practice time for each concept. Alternatively, reduce the scope of topics covered in this single module.
